name: Tiramisu
recipeIngredient: 1 wine glass Marsala wine or medium sherry
1 wine glass Scotch whisky or brandy
2 packets sponge fingers or Italian biscuits.
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and sugar with a whisk until pale and frothy.
2. Gradually beat in the mascarpone cheese, one spoonful at a time.
3. Add the Marsala wine to the mixture.
4. Place the coffee and whisky or brandy in a shallow dish.
5. Dip the sponge fingers into the coffee mixture, then arrange them in your chosen dish or tin.
6. Trim the biscuits to fill the gaps. Ensure the layer is even.
7. Spread half of the mascarpone mixture over the biscuits.
8. Sift cocoa powder over the layer.
9. Repeat steps 7 and 8 with the remaining ingredients.
10. Chill for at least 6 hours before serving.
11. Top with grated dark chocolate just before serving.
